01 - 2HS MAIN GAS SKID.desc: Normal Fire Flow Valve Open Limit Switch

04 - GLOW HEATER.section: BLAST GATE DS GLOW HEATER OFF
BLAST GATE OS GLOW HEATER OFF

06 - ECONOMIZER.desc: 3-Way Solenoid Valve To Force Full Bypass

04 - DOWNLEG COOLING SECTION.model:
Pro SW-29-8-C with 
IM interface Module

Yokogawa EJA110E.title: Yokogawa EJA110E Differential Pressure Transmitter
Yokogawa EJA110E.warn: Isolate process and depressurise impulse lines before calibration. SIL 2 rated — do not bypass safety interlocks.
steps: Verify tag, calibrated range (CAL RNG) and engineering units on nameplate match P&ID and datasheet
Check impulse line connections — high-pressure side to H port, low-pressure side to L port per drawing
Confirm 24VDC at terminals — minimum 10.5V loop voltage. Confirm cable glands sealed for IP rating
Open root valves slowly — equalise pressure before opening fully. Check for leaks at all connections
Zero cal: close both block valves, open equaliser — confirm 4mA (0%) at zero differential pressure
Span check: apply known differential pressure via calibrator — verify 20mA (100%) at full scale
Check linearity at 25%, 50%, 75% span — record as-found and as-left on calibration certificate
Set HART/PROFIBUS PA address — verify device visible in DCS with correct tag and engineering units
Confirm display mode, output mode and damping per project spec using FieldMate or HART communicator
Record serial number, calibration date, as-found error. Ships factory-calibrated — 5 yr interval SIL 2.
Yokogawa EJA110E.notes: DPharp factory-calibrated. SIL 2 certified per IEC 61511. Stability 0.1% per 10 years.

Yokogawa EJA530E.title: Yokogawa EJA530E Gauge Pressure Transmitter
Yokogawa EJA530E.warn: Isolate process before calibration. Do not exceed MWP on nameplate.
steps: Verify tag, range and units on nameplate match P&ID
Check process connection orientation — avoid trapped condensate in gas service
Confirm 24VDC at terminals. Open root valve slowly — check for leaks
At atmospheric pressure (isolated) — verify 4mA output and correct DCS reading
Apply full-scale pressure via calibrator — confirm 20mA at span
Check 25%, 50%, 75% span — record as-found and as-left
Set PROFIBUS PA address — confirm visible in control system
Confirm engineering units and display range correct
Record serial number, calibration date and range
Yokogawa EJA530E.notes: Gauge pressure variant of EJA series. Factory calibrated.

Schubert & Salzer 8021.title: Schubert & Salzer Type 8021 GS3 Sliding Gate Control Valve
Schubert & Salzer 8021.warn: Process must be isolated before mechanical work. Valve seals in flow direction ONLY — verify flow arrow before installation. Never disassemble under pressure.
steps: Verify flow direction arrow on body matches P&ID — 8021 seals in flow direction ONLY
Install centred between flanges (wafer type) — align ANSI 150/PN16 bolting and tighten in cross sequence
Connect instrument air to PS2 positioner at PZ port — typical supply 40-60 PSI. Check O-rings on fittings
Connect PROFIBUS PA signal — set bus address per project list. Factory default is 126
PS2 auto-commissioning: hold % button until setup mode, then hold + for 5 seconds — positioner strokes automatically
Wait for INIT to complete — positioner will stroke fully open then fully closed. Do NOT interrupt
Verify fail-safe: interrupt air — valve must spring-close. Confirm matches P&ID (FC = fail closed)
Full stroke test from DCS: command 0%, 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% — verify position feedback at each point
Set deadband (DEBA) to minimum stable value — increase only if valve hunts
Leak test packing and body flanges. Record stroke time: 2.5%/sec open & close
Schubert & Salzer 8021.notes: PS2 positioner: 6DR5510-0NN00-0AA3 (PA). DN50 Kvs=45, DN200 Kvs=560. Stroke rate per ITL: 2.5%/sec O&C.

Schubert & Salzer 7010.title: Schubert & Salzer Type 7010 Angle Seat Valve
Schubert & Salzer 7010.warn: Do not operate against closed downstream valve under pressure — seat damage may result.
steps: Verify NPT thread connections sealed with PTFE or sealant rated for process medium and temperature
Confirm spring-close action on loss of instrument air. Verify against P&ID fail action
Connect instrument air to solenoid/positioner supply port — check O-rings. Confirm supply pressure
Apply air and verify valve opens/closes correctly — confirm smooth operation, no binding
Set limit switches — adjust contacts for correct open and closed positions
Verify DCS reads correct OPEN/CLOSED state. Confirm wire polarity (NO/NC per I/O list)
Test solenoid: energise from DCS — valve opens. De-energise — spring-closes. Record response time
Pressure test all threaded connections and packing — no leakage at operating pressure
Schubert & Salzer 7010.notes: DN32 angle seat valve for pilot air/gas service. Includes 3/2-way solenoid 24VDC and SPDT limit switch.

EBRO HP111.title: EBRO HP111 High Performance Butterfly Valve
EBRO HP111.warn: Install in CLOSED position — disc WILL be damaged if flanges are tightened with disc open. NO gaskets needed. Test pressure must NOT exceed 1.5x PS with disc in OPEN position.
steps: Confirm disc is in FULLY CLOSED position before inserting between pipe flanges
Clean flange faces — must be smooth and plane-parallel per EN 1092-1 Type A/B. No gaskets required
Centre between flanges — insert bolts and hand-tighten. Tighten in cross pattern to specified torque
Connect ASCO WT8551 solenoid valve (24VDC) per wiring drawing — confirm correct coil voltage
Connect TVF-M2GGNEM switch box — adjust SPDT switches to actuate at full open and full closed
Apply instrument air — cycle valve fully open and closed. Confirm smooth rotation and no binding
Fail-safe test: de-energise solenoid — confirm valve spring-returns to CLOSED position
Check beacon: GREEN=open, RED=closed. Confirm correct state at DCS for both positions
Pressure test: open valve fully — test at max 1.0x PS. No leakage at body or shaft seals
Record test pressure, leak test result, switch setpoints and coil resistance in commissioning record
EBRO HP111.notes: HP111 double-eccentric with Inconel seat — rated to 600C. Maintenance-free. Leakage per EN 12266 Category B.

IFM SM7604.title: IFM SM7604 Magnetic-Inductive Flow Meter
IFM SM7604.warn: Pipe must be FULL at all times — partially filled pipes cause errors. Do NOT run dry. Medium above 50C: housing can reach 65C — burn hazard. Requires conductive medium.
steps: Verify flow direction: arrow on sensor housing must match process flow direction
Check straight pipe run: minimum 3x diameter upstream, 1x downstream of sensor
For plastic/ungrounded piping: install IFM E40234 grounding clamp — stray signals affect accuracy
Connect EVC711 M12 connector: Pin 1=Brown (+24VDC), Pin 3=Blue (GND), Pin 4=Black (output)
Power up with pipe full and process flowing — confirm green LED and flow reading on display
Set flow direction parameter if arrow does not match pipe — use IO-Link moneo configure software
Set switching setpoint SP1 with normal flow running — adjust above lowest acceptable flow rate
Set hysteresis HY to prevent rapid switching — typically 10-15% of setpoint value
Verify 4-20mA scaling at DCS: 4mA=0 flow, 20mA=max design flow. Confirm engineering units
Record setpoint, flow range and IO-Link address. Can also program via moneo|blue smartphone app
IFM SM7604.notes: Magnetic-inductive type — requires conductive medium. IO-Link V1.1. 43 units on CGL2. Set each setpoint individually in-situ.

IFM SM9604.title: IFM SM9604 Magnetic-Inductive Flow Meter
IFM SM9604.warn: Pipe must be FULL at all times. Do not run dry. Requires conductive medium.
steps: Verify flow direction arrow matches process flow direction
Check 3x diameter upstream and 1x downstream straight pipe run
Install grounding clamp for plastic or ungrounded piping
Connect EVC711 M12: Pin 1=+24VDC, Pin 3=GND, Pin 4=output
Power up with pipe full and flow running — confirm display reading
Set SP1 switching setpoint with normal flow present
Set hysteresis HY — typically 10-15% of setpoint
Verify 4-20mA output scaling at DCS
Record setpoint and flow range
IFM SM9604.notes: Larger range variant of SM7604. Same magnetic-inductive principle. IO-Link V1.1.

IFM SM6604.title: IFM SM6604 Magnetic-Inductive Flow Meter
IFM SM6604.warn: Pipe must be FULL at all times. Do not run dry.
steps: Verify flow direction arrow matches process flow direction
Check 3x diameter upstream and 1x downstream straight pipe run
Connect EVC711 M12: Pin 1=+24VDC, Pin 3=GND, Pin 4=output
Power up with pipe full and process flowing — confirm display
Set SP1 switching setpoint with normal flow present
Set hysteresis HY — typically 10-15% of setpoint
Verify 4-20mA output scaling at DCS
Record setpoint and flow range
IFM SM6604.notes: Smallest range variant of SM6/7/9604 series. Same commissioning approach.

A-T Controls V8C.title: A-T Controls V8C V-Port Ball Valve with Siemens PS2
A-T Controls V8C.warn: Spring-OPEN actuator (3R300SO) — valve OPENS on loss of air. Confirm fail-open intent on P&ID. N2 service — ensure area ventilated.
steps: Confirm flow direction — V-port ball valves are directional. V-port faces upstream
Connect FR-10-G filter regulator to instrument air — set pressure per actuator nameplate
Connect Siemens PS2 PROFIBUS PA positioner — set bus address per project address list
PS2 auto-commissioning: hold % button until setup mode, hold + for 5 seconds — auto-calibrates
Fail-safe: interrupt air — confirm valve moves to OPEN (spring-open = fail-open)
Full stroke test from DCS: command 0%, 50%, 100% — verify position feedback at each point
Check limit switches (MLS) — confirm correct OPEN/CLOSED state at DCS
Leak test all instrument air tubing and compression fittings with soapy water
A-T Controls V8C.notes: V8C 2.5" V-port carbon steel. Actuator 3R300SO (spring-open). PS2 PA positioner. FM/CSA Class 1 Div 1. N2 service on CGL2.
A-T Controls V8C.ref: A-T Controls V8C Installation & Maintenance Manual

Kinetrol 127-100.title: Kinetrol 127-100 Vane Actuator (Zone Damper)
Kinetrol 127-100.warn: Keep clear of shaft and lever rotation arc during testing. Do not exceed specified air supply pressure.
steps: Confirm actuator mounted on damper shaft — verify key/spline engagement and all fasteners secured
Set end stops: drive to CLOSED, set CLOSED stop. Drive to OPEN, set OPEN stop. Allow 2-3 degree clearance
Connect instrument air — confirm correct supply pressure per actuator nameplate (typically 60-80 PSI)
Energise solenoid from DCS — confirm air routes to correct actuator port. De-energise — confirm spring return
Cycle actuator fully open and closed — confirm smooth rotation and damper blade aligns with housing
If fitted with positioner: perform auto-commissioning per PS2 procedure
Confirm limit switch OPEN/CLOSED state at DCS matches expected
Verify fail-safe position on loss of instrument air
Kinetrol 127-100.notes: Kinetrol 127-100 vane actuator for zone damper service on CGL2 furnace. RCS zone damper application.

Kinetrol 107-100.title: Kinetrol 107-100 Vane Actuator
Kinetrol 107-100.warn: Keep clear of shaft rotation arc during testing.
steps: Confirm actuator mounted on shaft — verify coupling and all fasteners secure
Set end stops: CLOSED then OPEN, with 2-3 degree clearance from hard stop
Connect instrument air at correct supply pressure
Cycle actuator and confirm smooth operation and correct end positions
Confirm limit switch states at DCS
Verify fail-safe position on loss of air
Kinetrol 107-100.notes: Smaller variant of 127-100. Same commissioning approach.

Siemens TS500.title: Siemens TS500 Temperature Transmitter (PT100 RTD)
Siemens TS500.warn: Allow 15 minutes thermal stabilisation after process reaches steady state before recording calibration values.
steps: Confirm RTD connection: 3-wire or 4-wire per wiring drawing — check correct terminal assignment
Verify thermowell insertion depth — RTD tip must be fully immersed in the process stream
Power up — confirm no fault codes on display or via PROFIBUS diagnostic
Simulate low temperature with precision RTD calibrator — verify 4mA and correct DCS value
Simulate high temperature (span) — verify 20mA and correct DCS reading
Record in-situ temperature against NIST reference if process is running and accessible
Confirm engineering units (degrees C) and PROFIBUS PA address correct
Record serial number, calibration date, as-found and as-left errors
Siemens TS500.notes: PT100 RTD. Cold junction compensation not required for RTD. PROFIBUS PA output on CGL2.

Siemens P320.title: Siemens P320 Flow Transmitter
Siemens P320.warn: Process fluid must be present and flowing for final calibration.
steps: Verify tag, flow range and engineering units on nameplate match datasheet
Confirm installation meets upstream/downstream straight-run requirements per drawing
Power up via PROFIBUS PA — confirm minimum 9VDC at device terminals
Zero transmitter: with process at zero flow, set 4mA zero via PROFIBUS configurator
Span check: compare reading against reference meter at operating conditions
Confirm PROFIBUS PA address per project list — verify in DCS with correct tag
Confirm engineering units (Nm3/h or m3/h) and flow range scaling at DCS
Record calibration date, zero error and flow range
Siemens P320.notes: P320 on atmosphere/seal recirculation flow measurement. Confirm PA bus segment and address before energising.

Reotemp TCX-5331A.title: Reotemp TCX-5331A Thermocouple Assembly
Reotemp TCX-5331A.warn: Verify thermocouple type (K, J, N etc.) matches DCS input card configuration before connecting. Reverse polarity gives backwards reading.
steps: Confirm T/C type on nameplate matches DCS input card type (typically Type K for furnace)
Check extension wire polarity: for Type K, red conductor is NEGATIVE
Verify thermowell insertion depth — hot junction tip must be fully within thermowell
Connect head transmitter per wiring drawing — confirm 24VDC supply and signal pair
Power up — confirm output in range (not pegged at 3.6mA fault level)
Simulate low temperature with T/C calibrator — confirm correct DCS reading
Simulate high temperature (span) — confirm correct DCS reading
Record in-situ temperature against NIST reference if process is at temperature
Record T/C type, range, serial number and calibration date
Reotemp TCX-5331A.notes: TCX-5331A thermocouple assembly with integral head transmitter. Confirm T/C type and range in DCS before energising.

Siemens DGA211.title: Siemens DGA211 Electric Actuator
Siemens DGA211.warn: Ensure power is ISOLATED before wiring. Do NOT operate without travel limits correctly set — over-travel causes damage.
steps: Confirm mechanical coupling to valve/damper shaft — check backlash and key/spline engagement
Set travel limits BEFORE energising: drive to CLOSED, set closed cam. Drive to OPEN, set open cam
Wire actuator per wiring diagram — confirm correct supply voltage per nameplate
Power up — test LOCAL control first. Confirm correct rotation direction
Test CLOSE command from DCS — confirm correct rotation and CLOSED limit switch state
Test OPEN command — confirm rotation and OPEN limit switch state at DCS
Check torque settings — confirm does not over-torque at end stops. Adjust if required
Record supply voltage, travel time and limit switch states
Siemens DGA211.notes: DGA211 electric actuator. Confirm correct supply voltage per nameplate before energising.

Williamson MW.title: Williamson MW Series Infrared Pyrometer
Williamson MW.warn: Optical sight path must be clear and lens clean before use. Confirm ambient temperature rating not exceeded at mounting location. Emissivity must be set correctly — wrong value gives wrong reading.
steps: Confirm mounting angle and sight tube clear of obstructions and moisture per installation drawing
Clean optical lens with clean dry lint-free cloth before first use — no solvents
Connect 24VDC supply and 4-20mA signal pair per wiring drawing
Power up and allow minimum 15 minutes warm-up for detector stabilisation
Set emissivity value per process material: oxidised steel 0.85-0.95, bright steel 0.1-0.35
Compare reading against reference thermocouple at steady-state process temperature
Adjust emissivity if pyrometer reading does not match reference — confirm with process engineer
Confirm 4-20mA output scaling at DCS: 4mA=low temp range, 20mA=high temp range
Record emissivity setting, temperature range and calibration check result
Williamson MW.notes: Non-contact temperature. Emissivity must be confirmed with process engineer before finalising. MW series typically 500-3000F.
Williamson MW.ref: Williamson MW Series Installation & Operation Manual

Siemens SGA21.title: Siemens SGA21 Extractive Gas Analyser
Siemens SGA21.warn: Calibration gases required on site before commissioning. Some span gases are TOXIC or FLAMMABLE — ensure ventilation and wear PPE. Follow plant gas safety procedures.
steps: Confirm sample conditioning system clean and operational — check filters, driers and pump operation
Connect sample inlet and outlet — confirm no leaks in sample system tubing
Power up and allow minimum 30 minutes warm-up before calibration
Zero calibration: flow zero gas (N2 or clean dry air) at design flow rate — set zero
Span calibration: flow certified span gas of known concentration — set span
Verify analyser output matches span gas concentration at DCS
Confirm alarm setpoints (high, high-high) per project specification
Check sample pump flow rate and system response time — record in commissioning record
Record span gas certificate number, calibration date and as-found zero and span errors
Siemens SGA21.notes: Confirm measurement component (O2, CO, CO2 etc.) and range match P&ID. Span gas certificate required.

UEC H100.title: UEC H100 Field Enclosure / Junction Box
UEC H100.warn: Confirm all cable glands fitted and sealed before closing — IP rating void with open entries.
steps: Verify enclosure mounting location — confirm IP65 minimum maintained with all glands installed
Check all cable glands correct size, torqued and sealed where required
Verify all terminal connections match loop drawings — correct terminal numbers, polarities and shielding
Ground cable shields at ONE end only — confirm no double-grounding
Power up — measure supply voltage at all power terminals, confirm within specification
Test each I/O channel: inject test signal at field side, confirm correct level at DCS
Check door seal condition — replace if worn or damaged
UEC H100.notes: UEC H100 field enclosure/junction box. Commissioning is I/O wiring verification not device calibration.

Kuhme KVII.title: Kuhme KVII Valve
Kuhme KVII.warn: Confirm correct actuator size for valve torque requirement before installation.
steps: Verify valve tag, size and pressure rating match P&ID. Confirm flow direction if directional
Check actuator coupling — shaft engagement, key/spline correct, all fasteners torqued
Apply instrument air and cycle valve — confirm smooth operation full open to full close
Verify OPEN and CLOSED positions at DCS via limit switches or position transmitter
If fitted with positioner: perform auto-commissioning per PS2 procedure
Leak test body, packing and actuator fittings under operating pressure
Kuhme KVII.notes: Kuhme KVII series. Confirm model variant (KVII/F, KVII/FO, KVII/FS) matches design spec.

Kuhme KVF.title: Kuhme KVF Valve
Kuhme KVF.warn: Confirm correct actuator sizing before installation.
steps: Verify valve tag, size and pressure rating match P&ID
Check actuator coupling and fasteners
Apply instrument air and cycle valve — confirm smooth operation
Verify positions at DCS via limit switches
Leak test all connections under operating pressure
Kuhme KVF.notes: Kuhme KVF series. Similar commissioning approach to KVII.

Logika FCS.title: Logika FCS Flow Control System
Logika FCS.warn: Confirm configuration parameters match process design specification before commissioning. Incorrect setpoints may cause process instability.
steps: Verify flow measurement device installation — confirm straight-run requirements are met
Power up control unit and confirm display and status LEDs normal
Verify 4-20mA input signal from flow element received — check signal level at controller terminals
Configure flow range, engineering units and setpoints per design document
Test control loop: apply test setpoint from DCS and confirm output drives correctly
Check PID tuning — confirm stable with no hunting at steady state
Record all configuration parameters in commissioning record
Logika FCS.notes: Confirm all configuration matches approved project design specification.
Logika FCS.ref: Logika FCS Installation and Configuration Manual

FCV.title: Flow Control Valve
steps: Verify tag matches P&ID
Check actuator air/power supply and signal range
Stroke test: drive to 0%, 50%, 100% — verify position matches command
Check for leakage at closed position
Confirm fail position matches design intent
Calibrate positioner: set zero and span
Test with DCS and verify response

FT.title: Flow Transmitter
FT.warn: Process fluid must be present for final calibration.
steps: Verify tag, range and units match datasheet
Check installation per flow direction arrow
Power up: confirm 24VDC and loop wiring
Zero calibration at zero flow — confirm 4mA
Span calibration: apply known flow — verify 20mA
Confirm signal at DCS matches output

TT.title: Temperature Transmitter
steps: Verify T/C or RTD type matches DCS configuration
Check insertion depth and thermowell
Simulate low temperature — verify 4mA and DCS reading
Simulate high temperature — verify 20mA and DCS reading

PT.title: Pressure Transmitter
steps: Verify range matches P&ID
Check process connection and isolation valve
Apply zero pressure — confirm 4mA
Apply full scale — confirm 20mA
Check 25%, 50%, 75% span — record as-found and as-left

PSH.title: High Pressure Switch
PSH.warn: NFPA 85: must be trip-tested before commissioning.
steps: Verify setpoint matches design document
Temporarily lower setpoint below line pressure
Open isolation — confirm switch trips at setpoint
Verify BMS response correct
Restore original setpoint — confirm reset
Record trip point and hysteresis

PSL.title: Low Pressure Switch
PSL.warn: NFPA 85: must be trip-tested before commissioning.
steps: Verify setpoint matches design document
Reduce pressure below setpoint
Confirm switch trips and BMS responds correctly
Restore pressure — confirm switch resets
Record trip point and hysteresis

SSV.title: Safety Shutoff Valve
SSV.warn: NFPA 85: proof-of-closure switch must be verified.
steps: Verify tag matches P&ID and datasheet
Check manual operator and reset function
Energise — confirm valve opens fully
De-energise — confirm valve closes tightly
Verify proof-of-closure switch activates on close
Confirm BMS / interlock logic responds correctly

ZS.title: Position / Limit Switch
steps: Verify switch type (NO/NC) matches DCS I/O configuration
Manually actuate — confirm correct state change at both limits
Verify DCS reads correct open/closed status

ZSO.title: Open Position Switch
steps: Verify switch type matches DCS I/O
Actuate to open — confirm switch state
Verify DCS reads correct open status

ZSC.title: Closed Position Switch
steps: Verify switch type matches DCS I/O
Actuate to closed — confirm switch state
Verify DCS reads correct closed status

PCV.title: Pressure Control Valve
PCV.warn: Confirm inlet pressure within design limit.
steps: Verify tag, Cv rating and pressure class match P&ID
Stroke test fully closed to fully open — check smooth travel
Set regulator setpoint per design document
Test pressure control — vary upstream, verify outlet holds setpoint

IE.title: Ignition Electrode
steps: Verify insertion depth matches burner OEM spec
Check electrode gap per burner manual
Energise transformer — confirm spark
Verify ionisation signal detected by BMS during flame-on

EX.title: Ignition Transformer
steps: Verify input/output voltage per nameplate
Check wiring polarity
Energise and measure output voltage
Confirm output drives electrode correctly

MKL.title: Motor / Drive
steps: Check motor rotation direction
Verify drive parameters match spec
Confirm interlock and run permissives active
Test at low speed before full speed

JB.title: Junction Box
steps: Verify all cable glands sealed and IP rating maintained
Check all terminations match loop drawings
Label all wires per drawing

EH.title: Electric Resistance Heater
steps: Verify element resistance matches datasheet
Check thermocouple type and wiring
Apply power at low level — confirm temperature rise
Confirm over-temperature trip functions correctly

TCV.title: Temperature Control Valve
steps: Verify tag and Cv rating match P&ID
Stroke test 0-100% — check smooth travel
Confirm fail position on loss of signal
Test temperature control loop response

FV.title: Shutoff / Flow Valve
steps: Verify tag and valve type match P&ID
Check actuator air supply and signal
Open and close — confirm full stroke and end positions
Verify position feedback at DCS

LT.title: Level Transmitter
steps: Verify range and units match datasheet
Check process connection and isolation valve
Calibrate zero and span
Confirm DCS reading matches process

BWL.title: Position Transducer
steps: Verify mechanical coupling secure
Zero transducer at known position
Check span at full travel
Confirm DCS signal matches physical position
